title: REVIVED Farmer's Delight crops 3D
description: UNOFFICIAL update for Farmer's Delight crops 3D
body:
For Fabric version, [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/revived-farmers-delight-crops-3d-refabricated).

Also available at [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/unofficial-farmers-delight-crops-3d)

This **UNOFFICIAL** resource pack keeps up to date [Farmer's Delight crops 3D (CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/farmers-delight-crops-3d) and adds some additional features to improve its visual.

  

Major Fix
- render type fix
- missing model parts fix
 

Some Additional features
- 3D models for wild crops
 

Coming soon
- ~~Merging with [Nether's Delight crops 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nethers-delight-crops-3d)~~ (Implemented!)
- ~~corn delight support~~ (Implemented!)
- Model variation
- And more!
 



Suggest & Report is available on [forms](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScfSBV6_frlwlOsyyyIfXpRptl2VmqYNKy99Gl55r4tPGPtmw/viewform?usp=sf_link) and [Discord](https://discord.gg/uTDu7K3Ezn)
